name: atrium
description: Cross-venue portfolio margin for the EVM

pnpm.//supportedArchitectures: Fetch native binaries (lightningcss, sharp, etc.) for BOTH Linux (CI / WSL) and Windows (local dev). The lockfile was resolved on Linux, so a Windows-native `pnpm dev` was missing lightningcss.win32-x64-msvc.node and every CSS compile 500'd. Listing both keeps node_modules correct on either OS.

scripts.lint: pnpm -r lint && cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings
scripts.test: pnpm -r test && cargo test --workspace && forge test
scripts.clean: pnpm -r clean && cargo clean && forge clean
